name: daily
description: Date-organized daily notes via Obsidian's core Daily Notes plugin + Calendar; ports accuris's Timestamps pattern under beacon/daily/.

post_install.message: Daily blueprint installed at beacon/daily/. REQUIRED: enable the core Daily Notes plugin (Settings → Core plugins → Daily notes) AND optionally the Calendar community plugin (Settings → Community plugins → Browse → Calendar). Run command 'Daily notes: Open today's daily note' (or click a date in Calendar) to create your first daily note.
